features: 【90th Birthday Gift For Women】Special moments deserve special gifts! This is a beautiful gift specially made to commemorate the important milestone of 90 years old. Send warm wishes on her 90th birthday, this "Birthday Blanket" will be full of your love and warmth. Wrapped in comfort and happiness on her special day, may they be healthy, beautiful and happy.

【Great 90th Birthday Gift Idea For Women】The unforgettable and unique gift blanket you prepare for a 90-year-old woman means a lot on her birthday. Whether you are giving it to your mother, wife, sister, friend, neighbor, grandma, it is a fun surprise party decoration for women who are preparing to celebrate their 90th birthday with friends and family.

【Comfortable Material】The 90th birthday blanket is made of high-grade flannel, which is soft and durable, providing excellent touch and warmth. The birthday blanket measures 50"x60", making it an ideal companion for lunch breaks, rest and relaxation, whether watching a movie, reading, or just enjoying a cozy moment.

【Multi Purpose】This 90th birthday gift blanket is versatile and suitable for different seasons throughout the year. It is not only suitable for a cozy nap indoors, but also a beautiful decoration. The butterfly pattern adds elegance to the room. Whether it is a nap, TV time, reading around the fire, or outdoor leisure activities, this blanket can bring endless warmth.

【Easy To Care】Keep the blanket soft, comfortable and colorful with simple care. Machine wash with cold or warm water, tumble dry on low temperature. The design ensures that the blanket will remain soft after multiple washes, making it not only easy to care for, but also more lovable.
